title: dryopteris henriquesii
intro: Dryopteris henriquesii, also known as the Portuguese scaly male fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, fever, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dryopteris henriquesii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin, as well as its ability to act as a natural expectorant to relieve coughs and congestion. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
